text:
nope... samesame without...


Apropos: As it complains about " makeinfo: unrecognized option `--css-ref=/share/site.css'"

Ther is no such option in my makeinfo... 

BUT!!!:

I guess it's a problem with the basesystems makeinfo...

Ekki
